zh: 新增受控长期记忆，可学习明确偏好和常用应用
新增任务经验库、失败反思和相关经验复用
新增声明式技能候选、安全评测、用户批准和版本管理
新增学习数据日志、恢复点和一键回滚
en: Added controlled long-term memory for explicit preferences and commonly used apps
Added task experience, failure reflection, and relevant experience reuse
Added declarative skill candidates with safety evaluation, user approval, and versioning
Added learning change history, restore points, and rollback
